summary: Add a signal and emit it at the right point in existing code
prompt: The Player script below handles movement but does not notify other systems when the player's speed changes. Add a signal `speed_changed(new_speed: float)` and emit it whenever `current_speed` is modified by the `set_speed()` method. Do not change any existing behavior.
evaluation_notes: Must declare signal with typed parameter. Emit must pass new speed value. Must not change existing move logic. Signal declaration goes at top after extends.
